subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou Who art the Forgiver of sins, the Dispeller of sorrows, the Attractor of hearts, and the Concealer of every sinner, even should he be immersed in an ocean of transgressions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا غافر الذنوب و کاشف الکروب و جاذب القلوب و ستار لکل مذنب ولو خاض غمار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
